recipe.title: Mothership overnight oats
recipe.description: These handy little overnight oats give you options at breakfast time. Get prepped and organised for the week!

ingredients.name: semi-skimmed milk or your favourite unsweetened

steps.descr: In a blender, blitz the peeled bananas with the milk and...
steps.instructions: In a blender, blitz the peeled bananas with the milk and vanilla until smooth, then pour over the oats in a bowl. Coarsely grate in the apples, mix well, then cover and pop into the fridge overnight to do its thing.

on_enter.say: In a blender, blitz the peeled bananas with the milk and vanilla until smooth, then pour over the oats in a bowl. Coarsely grate in the apples, mix well, then cover and pop into the fridge overnight to do its thing.

steps.descr: The next day, stir well, correct the consistency with a...
steps.instructions: The next day, stir well, correct the consistency with a little extra milk, if needed, then either tuck in as it is, adding a handful of your favourite seasonal fruit, unsalted nuts or seeds, or choose one of the following epic flavours (Peach Melba, Cherry Bakewell, Berry Cheesecake and Tiramisù – each makes one tasty portion when paired with 220g of Mothership overnight oats. Fill. Your. Boots.
